JavaScript Hoisting: Why Does That Variable Say undefined?

During a JavaScript Q&A session I realized my mental model of hoisting was a little off, so I wrote this down to set it straight. This post walks through what hoisting actually is, why a variable can log undefined before it's assigned, how function declarations get hoisted, and how it all ties back to memory.
